title: MyNameIs
description: A simple mod to set your display name.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4265c688fb39a4ff9ff04e4b09a4eec18b3c84a9.png) # MyNameIs MyNameIs is a simple mod that allows players to change their display name,
using the added `/mynameis` command! ## Usage To set your name, simply type `/mynameis` followed by what you wish your new displayname to be! ![Example usage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb3769c036acb88ae3c819e28c650c0e5f59e048.png) You can also have spaces in your desired name, just be sure to encase it in `""` ![Example usage with spaces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c47b87c93c23403d8fa647c549244fa30be1e342.png)
